title: Commanders' Meeting
overview: The 7th Squad may have settled into a new normal, but trouble soon follows when the commanders hold a meeting.

title: Ren's Shadow
overview: Ren grows increasingly interested in Yukki, especially once one of the Eight Thunder Gods appears in his room.

title: A Storm Rolls In
overview: Yakumo wants nothing more than a harem full of women. But when she sets her sights on Yuuki, she just might decide to add him, too.

title: Rampage
overview: When Ren orders Kyouka to lend her Yuuki, the Supreme Commander unlocks a form befitting her power. However, even her might isn't enough to deny Yuuki a reward.

title: The Azuma Banquet
overview: A contest will decide the next head of the Azuma Family.

title: A New Azuma
overview: Fubuki challenges Himari to a duel.

title: Late Summer Slave
overview: Kyouka notices how many women are growing closer to Yuuki.

title: The Commander of the 2nd Squadron
overview: When a Thunder God begins abducting women, the Demon Defense Force sends Mira and Kyouka to confront her.

title: A Commander's Resolve
overview: Mira is a formidable fighter, but her opponent is a Thunder God. If she wants to win, she'll have to pull out all the stops.

title: Yokohama Showdown
overview: Kuusetsu's new power makes her more dangerous than ever.

title: Slave: Heaven
overview: Yuuki and Kyouka have come a long way, and they've forged a bond strong enough to stand against a god. But even if they win this battle, the war is far from over.

title: Gods Assemble
overview: In the aftermath, both the Demon Defense Force and the Thunder Gods prepare for what comes next.
